file_name: Endeavour Group - retail liquor store in Muswellbrook (NSW) - Questionnaire - 25 May 2026_2.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Endeavour Group or the Prince of Wales Hotel retail liquor store.
